race.comment: RICHE D'AMOUR (8) produced big late splits fresh at headquarters, charging hard home into third. He'll likely settle near the tail again from the draw, but with a genuine tempo he can be storming over the top late. FROM THE BLOCK (3) resumed as favourite on the Parks track and chased gamely into the placings. He'll take improvement from that effort and gets in well with the 3kg claim engaged. Capable of going a couple better second-up. PURE BLISS (2) didn't handle the conditions in the Proud Miss Stakes but was excellent first-up when bursting through along the inside to score. She's worth forgiving, though a tricky draw means she'll need a smart ride. MAJOR RUMBLE (11) resumes and will be hoping for a strong early tempo. Both his career wins have come at this track and there's no reason he can't add another. OMAHA DAWN (14) has been solid in both runs back and should be nearing peak fitness now. Holder sticking aboard is a positive.
